component.name: CC Token Saver MCP
component.summary: MCP server that delegates simple tasks to a local LLM to save Claude Code tokens

description.p: CC Token Saver MCP is a Model Context Protocol server that exposes a locally running LLM as tools for Claude Code to use. By routing simple, well-defined subtasks to the local LLM, it reduces the number of tokens consumed by Claude Code on repetitive or low-complexity operations.
Tasks the local LLM can handle include:

The server connects to any OpenAI-compatible API endpoint, making it compatible with local inference servers such as LM Studio, Ollama, or llama.cpp. Configuration is done via environment variables or a .env file.
